series_metadata.series_description: File contains Ohio Lottery General Purchase Requisition forms, which are required to be completed for all purchases of goods/services to be submitted to (OhioBuys). The file is maintained by purchase requisition number, date, and user OHID.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: all purchase requisitions directly related a contract six (6) years and one (1) day termination of contract, review administrative value ; Electronic: digital copy in system four (4) years, Auditor of State issues audit report, review administrative value
